channel.title: My Car Story With Lou Page
channel.description: My Car Story With Lou Page

item.title: 1969 Mercury Marauder X‑100
item.description: Big, bold, and built for speed. How did the Marauder X‑100 carve its place in muscle car history?

media:content.media:title: 1969 Mercury Marauder X‑100
media:content.media:description: Big, bold, and built for speed. How did the Marauder X‑100 carve its place in muscle car history?
media:content.media:credit: My Car Story With Lou Page

item.title: Time Capsule ’66 Buick Hits 10K Miles!
item.description: Barely driven yet perfectly preserved. How did this ’66 Buick stay frozen in time with only 10,000 miles?

media:content.media:title: Time Capsule ’66 Buick Hits 10K Miles!
media:content.media:description: Barely driven yet perfectly preserved. How did this ’66 Buick stay frozen in time with only 10,000 miles?
media:content.media:credit: My Car Story With Lou Page

item.title: 1978 Ford Mustang II King Cobra in Orange
item.description: A bold shade meets muscle heritage. What makes the ’78 King Cobra such a standout in Mustang history?

media:content.media:title: 1978 Ford Mustang II King Cobra in Orange
media:content.media:description: A bold shade meets muscle heritage. What makes the ’78 King Cobra such a standout in Mustang history?
media:content.media:credit: My Car Story With Lou Page

item.title: Dream Car Found! ’66 Mercury Comet Cyclone GT 390
item.description: The hunt ends with a dream find—the ’66 Cyclone GT 390. What makes this Mercury muscle car a collector’s prize?

media:content.media:title: Dream Car Found! ’66 Mercury Comet Cyclone GT 390
media:content.media:description: The hunt ends with a dream find—the ’66 Cyclone GT 390. What makes this Mercury muscle car a collector’s prize?
media:content.media:credit: My Car Story With Lou Page

item.title: Meet Hank’s ’61 Chevy Nomad | A True Classic
item.description: Hank’s 1961 Chevy Nomad blends family history with timeless style. What makes this wagon a cherished classic?

media:content.media:title: Meet Hank’s ’61 Chevy Nomad | A True Classic
media:content.media:description: Hank’s 1961 Chevy Nomad blends family history with timeless style. What makes this wagon a cherished classic?
media:content.media:credit: My Car Story With Lou Page

item.title: One Loaded 1967 Chevrolet Camaro RS SS
item.description: Packed with options and muscle, the ’67 Camaro RS SS is a dream ride. What features make this one loaded classic unforgettable?

media:content.media:title: One Loaded 1967 Chevrolet Camaro RS SS
media:content.media:description: Packed with options and muscle, the ’67 Camaro RS SS is a dream ride. What features make this one loaded classic unforgettable?
media:content.media:credit: My Car Story With Lou Page

item.title: Pre‑War Elegance | 1937 Ford Tudor
item.description: Graceful lines and timeless design define the 1937 Ford Tudor. What makes this pre‑war classic a standout in automotive history?

media:content.media:title: Pre‑War Elegance | 1937 Ford Tudor
media:content.media:description: Graceful lines and timeless design define the 1937 Ford Tudor. What makes this pre‑war classic a standout in automotive history?
media:content.media:credit: My Car Story With Lou Page

item.title: 1966 Cobra | Built Only for Racing
item.description: This Cobra wasn’t made for the street—it was born for the track. What racing legacy does the 1966 Cobra carry?

media:content.media:title: 1966 Cobra | Built Only for Racing
media:content.media:description: This Cobra wasn’t made for the street—it was born for the track. What racing legacy does the 1966 Cobra carry?
media:content.media:credit: My Car Story With Lou Page

item.title: Reimagined Classic | 2018 Hurst GSS 300H
item.description: Blending heritage with modern design, the 2018 Hurst GSS 300H reimagines a classic. How does it honor the past while pushing forward?

media:content.media:title: Reimagined Classic | 2018 Hurst GSS 300H
media:content.media:description: Blending heritage with modern design, the 2018 Hurst GSS 300H reimagines a classic. How does it honor the past while pushing forward?
media:content.media:credit: My Car Story With Lou Page

item.title: 1969 Dodge Monaco Station Wagon Is a Beast
item.description: Family hauler meets muscle—this ’69 Dodge Monaco wagon packs serious power. What makes it a beast on the road?

media:content.media:title: 1969 Dodge Monaco Station Wagon Is a Beast
media:content.media:description: Family hauler meets muscle—this ’69 Dodge Monaco wagon packs serious power. What makes it a beast on the road?
media:content.media:credit: My Car Story With Lou Page

item.title: The Legendary 1970 Torino GT Convertible
item.description: With muscle and style, the 1970 Torino GT Convertible turned heads. What makes this drop‑top a legend among collectors?

media:content.media:title: The Legendary 1970 Torino GT Convertible
media:content.media:description: With muscle and style, the 1970 Torino GT Convertible turned heads. What makes this drop‑top a legend among collectors?
media:content.media:credit: My Car Story With Lou Page

item.title: 1962 Pontiac Catalina in Cameo White | Engine Start‑Up
item.description: A crisp Cameo White Catalina fires to life. What makes the 1962 Pontiac’s start‑up such a thrill for enthusiasts?

media:content.media:title: 1962 Pontiac Catalina in Cameo White | Engine Start‑Up
media:content.media:description: A crisp Cameo White Catalina fires to life. What makes the 1962 Pontiac’s start‑up such a thrill for enthusiasts?
media:content.media:credit: My Car Story With Lou Page

item.title: 1957 or 2003 — Which Ford Thunderbird You Pickin’?
item.description: Two eras, one nameplate. Do you prefer the timeless elegance of the ’57 Thunderbird or the modern flair of the 2003 revival?

media:content.media:title: 1957 or 2003 — Which Ford Thunderbird You Pickin’?
media:content.media:description: Two eras, one nameplate. Do you prefer the timeless elegance of the ’57 Thunderbird or the modern flair of the 2003 revival?
media:content.media:credit: My Car Story With Lou Page

item.title: A Craigslist Purchase | 1965 Buick Riviera
item.description: One click led to a classic find—the 1965 Buick Riviera. Was this Craigslist purchase a hidden gem or a risky gamble?

media:content.media:title: A Craigslist Purchase | 1965 Buick Riviera
media:content.media:description: One click led to a classic find—the 1965 Buick Riviera. Was this Craigslist purchase a hidden gem or a risky gamble?
media:content.media:credit: My Car Story With Lou Page

item.title: ’69 Cyclone Spoiler | NASCAR Born
item.description: Built for speed and competition, the ’69 Cyclone Spoiler was born on the NASCAR track. What performance features cemented its legendary status?

media:content.media:title: ’69 Cyclone Spoiler | NASCAR Born
media:content.media:description: Built for speed and competition, the ’69 Cyclone Spoiler was born on the NASCAR track. What performance features cemented its legendary status?
media:content.media:credit: My Car Story With Lou Page

item.title: 1956 Golden Sahara
item.description: A futuristic vision from the ’50s, the Golden Sahara dazzled with innovation and style. What made this custom creation a true automotive icon?

media:content.media:title: 1956 Golden Sahara
media:content.media:description: A futuristic vision from the ’50s, the Golden Sahara dazzled with innovation and style. What made this custom creation a true automotive icon?
media:content.media:credit: My Car Story With Lou Page

item.title: 1958 Buick Caballero | A Timeless Beauty
item.description: The Caballero Estate Wagon shines with elegance and innovation. What makes this 1958 Buick a true classic among collectors?

media:content.media:title: 1958 Buick Caballero | A Timeless Beauty
media:content.media:description: The Caballero Estate Wagon shines with elegance and innovation. What makes this 1958 Buick a true classic among collectors?
media:content.media:credit: My Car Story With Lou Page

item.title: Timeless Elegance | 1957 BMW 507 Roadster Captivates
item.description: Sleek lines and rare craftsmanship make the BMW 507 a timeless masterpiece. What sets this 1957 roadster apart from the rest?

media:content.media:title: Timeless Elegance | 1957 BMW 507 Roadster Captivates
media:content.media:description: Sleek lines and rare craftsmanship make the BMW 507 a timeless masterpiece. What sets this 1957 roadster apart from the rest?
media:content.media:credit: My Car Story With Lou Page
